publicationStmt.p: Transcribed from Bodleian Library, Lovelace Byron collection, Box 166, folios 226-227. Transcription by Lisa Gold (2022). TEI conversion for Sextant pipeline, 2026.

div.p: Dearest Mate. I think you must use your own discretion in settling about the children. The respective disadvantages of delaying them, or of separating the Coachman from any of his family, more especially the ailing portion of it, are to be weighed.-- With
respect to us, it would have been impossible for me to leave Town before Thursdy, at any rate, on account of my teeth.

There is a very painful & lengthy operation to be performed, & I shall not feel quite sure till after tomorrow's visit to Mr Lauzelle, that I shall not be obliged to stay till Friday even, but I hope not.--
Bird is very happy & well; have been
to see the Panoramas & Cosmorama,-- both most exquisite; & last night Charlotte & I to the French Play, at the Prince's Theatre.--
Wills will tell you of the careless unpardonable blunder at the Railway. I went immediately to the Manager at the London Station, about it.--
